title: ComplianceEvalRecord
description: One record per compliance run (compliance-eval-record/v1). Single source of truth across wasmagent-js and trace-pipeline.

task_spec_hash.description: Stable hash of the TaskSpec JSON (e.g. sha256). Groups runs of the same spec across models and time.

model.description: Identifier of the model under test (e.g. 'qwen2.5-1.5b').

mode.description: Execution mode: direct = single pass; prompt_retry = retry with violation hints; full_pcl = Protocol-Constrained Local Repair.

violations.description: Initial violation list (before repair). Empty if first generation passed.

final_pass.description: True iff all hard constraints passed after repair.

artifact.description: Final model output text (after all repair rounds).

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock latency in milliseconds for the full run.

trace_uri.description: Optional pointer to a fuller trace artifact (e.g. RolloutMemoryStore JSONL line).

error.description: Non-null iff the run failed infrastructurally. When present, final_pass MUST be false.

message.description: Original error message, truncated to 1000 chars.
